title: ophrys × lydia
intro: Ophrys × lydia, commonly known as the false bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal issues. Its health benefits include the treatment of indigestion, nausea, and diarrhea, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The herbal preparations of Ophrys × lydia typically involve infusing the plant in hot water or making a tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
